title: Campus WiFi disconnects every few minutes
description: The hostel WiFi disconnects every ten minutes and I have to reconnect repeatedly during assignments.

title: No water in second floor washroom
description: There has been no water in the second floor hostel washroom since early morning and several rooms are affected.

title: Exam timetable overlap for elective papers
description: The exam timetable lists two elective papers at the same time and I need the schedule checked urgently.

title: Fee receipt still missing after payment
description: My semester fee payment succeeded yesterday but the receipt is still not available in the portal or email.

title: Sensitive complaint requiring confidential handling
description: I need to file a confidential harassment complaint and I do not want my identity to be exposed widely during the process.
